calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-21-2020 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-23-2020 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-21-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Shustoff for and with Timothy Murphy (Petitioner).

Mr. Shustoff stated that there is no evidence that the Decedent intended to revoke the will, that it appears she spilled some liquid on it, that the assumption is that whatever she spilled smeared the signatures, that he was present when the Decedent signed the will and that no one heard from the Decedent as to any intent to revoke the will. Mr. Murphy stated that the will was originally put in the book (he had the book with him in Court) and that he was present when the Decedent put the will in the book. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-23-2019 Continued To Nov-20-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
